title: AWF Token Usage Record
description: A single per-API-call token usage record emitted to token-usage.jsonl by the AWF api-proxy sidecar.

_schema.description: Schema identifier and version for this record (e.g. "token-usage/v0.26.0"). Dev builds use "token-usage/v0.0.0-dev".

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the API call completed.

event.description: Stable event discriminator for token usage records.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this API request (UUID or provider-assigned ID).

provider.description: LLM provider that handled this request.

model.description: Model name returned by the provider (e.g. 'gpt-4o', 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514').

path.description: API endpoint path for this request (e.g. '/v1/messages', '/v1/chat/completions').

status.description: HTTP response status code returned by the provider.

streaming.description: Whether the response was a streaming (SSE) response.

cache_read_tokens.description: Number of tokens read from the provider's prompt cache (Anthropic cache_read_input_tokens or OpenAI cached_tokens).

cache_write_tokens.description: Number of tokens written to the provider's prompt cache (Anthropic cache_creation_input_tokens).

response_bytes.description: Total number of bytes in the response body (optional, omitted for WebSocket upgrades).

x_initiator.description: The X-Initiator header value sent on the request. Determines billing treatment: 'agent' requests are not billed as premium, 'user' requests are. Present only for Copilot-bound requests.

billing.description: Billing/quota information extracted from upstream response headers (X-Quota-Snapshot-*, X-RateLimit-*). Present only when the upstream returns billing headers.

quota_premium-chat.description: X-Quota-Snapshot-Premium-Chat parsed fields. Tracks premium request units (PRU).
